_doc: Shards of Alara (ALA) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ala.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 60U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, C1/C2 commons. Occasional foil (1:56) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: First set of this size and the first set with mythic rares. Printed in USA only (Belgian unknown). 36 packs per box. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card. Tournament packs described but not modelled.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:56
